name: Broccoli & Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breasts, boned, skinned, and halved
Chicken broth (not enough to make it runny)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the chicken breasts at 350°F for 30-45 minutes, or cook another way.
2. Place cooked chicken on top of the frozen broccoli.
3. Combine the cream of chicken soup, cream of mushroom soup, chicken broth, mayonnaise, lemon juice, and shredded cheese in a bowl.
4. Pour the sauce over the broccoli and chicken.
5. Combine 1 cup bread crumbs and 1 tablespoon melted butter.
6. Sprinkle the breadcrumb mixture on top of the dish.
7. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
